svg.title: Threat documentation example for SQL injection
svg.desc: A text slide documenting a SQL injection threat with name, description, goal, technique, privileges, impact, and mitigations.
svg.text: SQL injection in the database server path
The attacker manipulates input parameters to alter SQL queries.
Unauthorized access, modification, or deletion of data.
Injection of malicious SQL through unvalidated input.
Often none when the vulnerable input is publicly reachable.
High due to potential loss of confidentiality and integrity.
Parameterized queries and strict input validation.
